name: Youzan
description: Chinese commerce SaaS (有赞) providing WeChat/mini-program storefronts, OMS, marketing automation for SMBs.

seo.title: Youzan — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Youzan: Chinese commerce SaaS (有赞) providing WeChat/mini-program storefronts, OMS, marketing automation for SMBs.

when_to_use: WeChat-based storefront for a Chinese SMB with OMS integration
Marketing automation for a Chinese D2C brand via Youzan
Mini-program store with loyalty and coupon marketing automation
Order management and fulfillment automation for Chinese sellers
CRM-connected WeChat commerce for subscription and retention

pros: Large Chinese SMB user base — proven fit
review.verdict: One of the two go-to SaaS platforms for Chinese SMB commerce on WeChat; pointless outside that market.
review.best_for: Chinese SMB merchants needing WeChat storefronts, OMS, and marketing in a single SaaS
review.not_for: Non-Chinese merchants or teams needing global commerce capabilities
